debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
c d : α
h1 h2 : Hom c d
h : h1 ≠ h2
⊢ @CategoryInContext.NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c α C c d h1 ≠ @CategoryInContext.NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c α C c d h2

proof:
intro heq
  apply h
  calc h1 = h1 ≫ id d := (comp_id h1).symm
    _ = (NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c c d h1).arrow d (id d) := rfl
    _ = (NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c c d h2).arrow d (id d) := by rw [heq]
    _ = h2 ≫ id d := rfl
    _ = h2 := comp_id h2
successful_attempts:
intro heq
  apply h
  calc h1 = h1 ≫ id d := (comp_id h1).symm
    _ = (NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c c d h1).arrow d (id d) := rfl
    _ = (NatTrans_Hom_c_?_Hom_?_c c d h2).arrow d (id d) := by rw [heq]
    _ = h2 ≫ id d := rfl
    _ = h2 := comp_id h2
